narrative_beat: Medium of stone altar with three vertical flames — red, gold, ochre — each projecting smoke word: PALAVRAS, TEMPOS, LEI

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a rough-hewn stone altar with three tall vertical flames of distinct colors
subject.focal_point: the smoke rising from each flame forming three Portuguese words in visible script
subject.secondary: Background: broken Roman column in deep P&B. Embers floating.

composition.foreground: three flames and smoke words in rich vivid red, gold and ochre

lighting.key_light: warm flame light from flames themselves

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: three specific actions of the beast

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: rising smoke forming ancient gothic Portuguese capital letters
in_scene_text.medium: flame-smoke writing in the air above each flame
in_scene_text.placement: three words arranged horizontally, one above each flame

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
